title: [FIRRTL] FART: logic to reuse existing port can result in the wrong reset

features.name: submodule instantiation with async reset port and internal register reset
features.description: Code should include a child module with an async reset input port that instantiates a register with that reset, and a parent module that connects its own async reset source to the child's reset port

features.name: reset port name matching and domain reuse across module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include multiple modules with identically named reset input ports where the parent connects a reset signal that differs semantically from the child's internal reset usage
